entities.name: GEOSPATIAL TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Tools and technologies used for generating crop statistics and area computation in agriculture

entities.name: CROP STATISTICS
entities.description: Statistical data related to crop production and area

entities.name: AUTHENTICITY
entities.description: The quality of being genuine and accurate in data compilation

entities.name: ERROR-FREE DATA COMPILATION
entities.description: The process of gathering and organizing data without mistakes

entities.name: GIS-BASED AREA COMPUTATION
entities.description: The use of Geographic Information Systems to calculate the area of agricultural land

entities.name: TRACEABILITY
entities.description: The ability to verify the history, location, or application of data

entities.name: ESTIMATION OF AREA OF MIXED CROPS
entities.description: The process of calculating the area occupied by multiple crop types in a single field

entities.name: GPS
entities.description: Global Positioning System used for precise location tracking and updating field boundaries

entities.name: FIELD BUNDS
entities.description: The boundaries or embankments of agricultural fields

entities.name: NON-AVAILABILITY OF FARMERS
entities.description: The situation where farmers are not present or accessible for data collection

entities.name: LEGAL PURPOSE
entities.description: The use of geospatial data for official legal or regulatory requirements

entities.name: CONSOLIDATION OF HOLDING LEVEL DATA
entities.description: The process of merging and organizing data at the individual land holding level

entities.name: UPGRADATION OF SKILLS OF PERSONNEL
entities.description: The improvement of technical capabilities of the staff operating the technology

entities.name: PUBLIC AND PRIVATE SECTORS
entities.description: Governmental and non-governmental organizations that require agricultural data

entities.name: RELUCTANCE TO ADOPT TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The hesitation or unwillingness of stakeholders to implement new geospatial tools

entities.name: FINANCIAL ALLOCATION
entities.description: The provision of funds by the government for technology adoption

entities.name: AGRICULTURE STATISTICS
entities.description: The broad field of statistical data collection and analysis for agriculture

relationships.target: ESTIMATION OF AREA OF MIXED CROPS
